title: euonymus fortunei var. vegetus
intro: Euonymus fortunei var. vegetus, also known as Wintercreeper, is a type of flowering evergreen shrub native to China and Japan. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and infections. The health benefits of Euonymus fortunei var. vegetus include its ability to reduce swelling, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes.
